case_title: DUNNE GWEN et al VS GOLDBERG BRUCE E et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDBERG BRUCE E

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-01-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
